word: H3819 - לֹא רֻחָמָה - Lôʼ Ruchâmâh - lo roo-khaw-maw' - Lo-ruhamah

sections.paragraph:
Original: לא רחמה

Transliteration: lô' rûchâmâh

Phonetic: lo roo-khaw-maw'

BDB Definition:

Lo-ruhamah = "no mercy"
  1. (Pual) symbolic name given by the prophet Hosea to his daughter

Origin: from H3808 and H7355

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
